job_snippets: Design, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or GitLab CI/CD for automated testing and deployment.
Manage containerized infrastructure with Docker and Kubernetes; administer EKS, AKS, or GKE clusters.
Write Infrastructure as Code with Terraform, Ansible, or CloudFormation; manage state and drift detection.
Implement GitOps workflows using ArgoCD or Flux for declarative, version-controlled deployments.
Build and maintain observability stacks: metrics (Prometheus/Grafana), logging (ELK/Loki), and tracing (Jaeger/Tempo).
Automate infrastructure provisioning and configuration management with Ansible or Chef.
Manage secrets and certificate lifecycle: HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, cert-manager.
Design networking for multi-cloud or hybrid environments: VPCs, peering, VPNs, transit gateways.
Perform capacity planning, performance tuning, and incident response; on-call with SLA commitments.
Implement database automation: backups, failover testing, schema migration pipelines.
Set up software artifact management: Nexus, JFrog Artifactory, GitHub Packages.
Develop internal developer platforms (IDPs) to improve developer productivity and self-service.
Apply DevSecOps practices: SAST/DAST in CI pipeline, vulnerability scanning, policy-as-code (OPA).
Manage cloud costs and optimize resource utilization; implement tagging and FinOps practices.
Write automation scripts in Python, Go, or Bash to reduce toil and manual operations.
Collaborate with developers to improve build times, test reliability, and deployment frequency.
Manage SLA/SLO/SLI frameworks and error budgets; lead blameless post-mortems.
Evaluate and adopt new tooling; maintain internal tooling and runbooks.
Support multi-tenant Kubernetes environments; implement namespace isolation and resource quotas.
Experience with service mesh (Istio) and advanced networking for microservices architectures.
